div.p: Your trusted local medical centre — providing personalised, high-quality healthcare with warmth and professionalism for every member of your family.
Quick Access

p.style: color: var(--slate); font-size: 1.05rem; max-width: 640px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.7;

div.p: From preventive care to specialised treatments — delivered by experienced professionals in a caring, modern environment.
Preventive care, chronic disease management & full health assessments.
Immunisations, developmental checks & complete family care.
Antenatal care, contraception, cervical screening & menopause support.
Prostate checks, cardiovascular screening & mental wellbeing support.
Full-body skin exams, mole mapping & biopsy/excision services.
Mental health care plans, counselling referrals & anxiety/depression management.
Pre-travel vaccinations, malaria prevention & destination health advice.
Wound care, suturing, injections, cryotherapy & ear syringing.
in Seaford VIC
We combine clinical expertise with genuine compassion in modern facilities — focused on listening, clear communication and your long-term wellbeing.
Experienced GPs
Our doctors bring decades of combined experience across all major health disciplines.
Bulk Billing Available
We believe quality healthcare should be accessible — bulk billing for eligible patients.
Online Booking 24/7
Book your appointment anytime, anywhere — it takes less than 60 seconds.
Modern Facilities
State-of-the-art consultation rooms and in-clinic diagnostic equipment.

p.style: color: var(--slate); font-size: 1.05rem; max-width: 560px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.7;

div.p: Dedicated professionals committed to providing the highest standard of personalised care.
Dr. Sarah Johnson
Over 15 years of experience in family medicine and preventive care.
Dr. Michael Chen
Special interest in child development and family-centred medicine.
Dr. Emily Williams
Expert in skin cancer detection and dermatological procedures.
The team here truly cares. Thorough, kind and professional — best clinic I've experienced. I always feel listened to and never rushed.
Sarah M.
Warm atmosphere, friendly staff and easy online booking. Found my new regular clinic — couldn't be happier.
James T.
Listened carefully and explained everything clearly. As a new patient I felt immediately at ease — fantastic experience from start to finish.
Rachel K.

div.style: background: var(--white); border: 1px solid rgba(56,153,172,0.1); border-radius: 20px; padding: 28px; max-width: 440px;

div.p: For medical emergencies call 000
After-hours GP helpline: 1800 022 222

div.div: Seaford East Medical Clinic, Seaford VIC 3198

h2.style: font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 800; color: var(--white); margin: 16px 0 20px;

p.style: font-size: 1.1rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); max-width: 580px; margin: 0 auto 40px; line-height: 1.7;

div.p: Our friendly team is here to help. Book online in seconds or give us a call today.

div.style: display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;
